title: Vanilla Beyond
description: A vanilla plus modpack I made for me and my friends
body:
![Vanilla Beyond](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e94da1029f99906a0dbcfb6c3619b77ea33ee424.png)

### A vanilla-plus modpack for the latest version of Minecraft to play with your friends ###

**Features:**

🪶 **30+ Optimzation Mods** (Built off [Fabulously Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/fabulously-optimized)) for improved performance

🌐 **Free Multiplayer Support** through the Essential Mod

✨ **Visual Enhancements & Shaders** for a fresh, immersive experience

🏰 **New Dungeons** from the Dungeons and Taverns Mod, with unique treasures and adventures

🏔️ **Overhauled World Generation & New Structures** to make exploring fresh

🏡 **New Decorative Blocks** to transform your builds

⚙️ **New, Subtle Enhancements** to refine and expand the Minecraft experience

🔧 **Many QoL Changes & Bug Fixes** for smooth and seamless gameplay

🌟 And **even more mods** to bring your world to life

(Credit to the authors of the _Fabulously Optimized_ modpack for providing the foundation for this pack, and to the creators of _Mod Menu Helper_, included as part of Fabulously Optimized.)
